title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week's updates focus on making OpsPal more reliable and easier to use. We've added better session monitoring to help identify performance issues, improved how the platform handles skills and content management, and fixed several behind-the-scenes issues that were causing inefficiencies. These improvements will result in smoother workflows and fewer interruptions during your revenue operations work.

entries.headline: Added session performance scoring and troubleshooting tools
details: You can now see how smoothly your OpsPal sessions are running and get detailed logs to help resolve any performance issues

entries.headline: Cleaned up content management to prevent duplicate information
details: OpsPal now automatically removes duplicate sections and outdated content, keeping your workspace organized and reducing clutter

entries.headline: Resolved license activation issues that caused system loops
details: Fixed a problem where license verification would get stuck in a cycle, causing delays and interruptions to your work

entries.headline: Enhanced and organized 98 automation skills for better performance
details: Updated nearly 100 built-in skills with better organization and naming, making them more reliable and easier to find

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce workflow validation and permission management
details: Improved how OpsPal checks and manages Salesforce workflows and user permissions, reducing setup errors and access issues
